test_scenario: Phase 8 execution with three tasks (A parallel, B parallel, C sequential)

phase_8_execution_model.step_1: Load task graph via RESUME, determine ready tasks
phase_8_execution_model.step_2: Process in dependency order: identify A, B ready and parallel; C sequential
phase_8_execution_model.step_2a: Launch subagent for A, launch subagent for B (concurrent)
phase_8_execution_model.step_2b: Wait for both subagents to complete

delegation_rules.phase_8_when_to_use: Only for implementation task issues marked parallel whose dependencies are already satisfied
delegation_rules.sequential_tasks: Always executed by the primary agent
delegation_rules.partitioning: Each agent handles exactly one task issue
delegation_rules.file_overlap_rule: If file overlap detected, convert tasks to sequential execution
delegation_rules.context_in_prompt: Full context for subagent - no shared state assumption

subagent_a_prompt.files_must_not_write: Any files outside the explicit list

subagent_b_prompt.files_must_not_write: Any files outside the explicit list

primary_agent_execution_of_c.task_c: Sequential task (always executed by primary agent)
primary_agent_execution_of_c.when: After subagents complete and report results
primary_agent_execution_of_c.red_stage: Write failing test, run, confirm failure, record comment on #C
primary_agent_execution_of_c.green_stage: Update #C stage to green, write code, run, confirm pass, record comment
primary_agent_execution_of_c.refactor_stage: Update #C stage to refactor, clean up, rerun, confirm pass, record comment, close #C

comment_recording.what: Subagent results converted to comment format
comment_recording.github_issues: Recorded as comments on task issues #A, #B, #C respectively
comment_recording.one_comment_per_stage: RED comment, GREEN comment, REFACTOR comment

concurrency_guarantees.file_isolation: Task A and B have non-overlapping files
concurrency_guarantees.no_conflicts: Both subagents run concurrently without interference

execution_timeline.phase_8a: Subagent A (RED→GREEN→REFACTOR) concurrent with Subagent B (RED→GREEN→REFACTOR)
execution_timeline.phase_8b: Primary agent collects results, records as comments on #A and #B
execution_timeline.phase_8c: Primary agent executes Task C (RED→GREEN→REFACTOR), records as comments on #C
execution_timeline.total_time: Phase 8a duration: max(A duration, B duration); Phase 8c duration: C duration

key_rules.delegation_rule: Only parallel tasks are delegated; sequential tasks executed by primary agent
key_rules.statelessness: Each subagent receives complete context in prompt
key_rules.github_canonical: Primary agent records all durable artifacts (comments) in GitHub
key_rules.no_local_files: No 07-implementation-log.md; all progress in GitHub comments
key_rules.strict_tdd: RED → GREEN → REFACTOR loop with no untested code paths

references_cited: workflow.md line 235 (Parallelism: run tasks concurrently when dependencies satisfied)
delegation-rules.md line 105 (Only parallel tasks delegated; sequential always primary)
delegation-rules.md lines 109-113 (Partition rules and file overlap detection)
delegation-rules.md line 10 (Full context in prompt - subagents are stateless)
delegation-rules.md line 12 (GitHub is canonical - primary agent records artifacts)
